title: PHASE3: Transplant checkpoint features & reconcile RPL branches to unblock 0.59
description: Transplant BLE MTU, SLIP escape, KISS shutdown, bounds checking to C (lichen/subsys/lichen/transport/*, lichen/subsys/lichen/l2/*) and Python (python/src/lichen/interface/kiss/*, python/src/lichen/slip/*, python/src/lichen/ipv6/*). Add ICMPv6/UDP/LOADng/GPSR/RPL validation. Reconcile integration/rust-rpl-recovery and integration/rust-prefix-model into main. Run pytest and west tests. Close all related beads.
